subcodes.first_line: O pure and confident leaf! Though thou hast been afflicted with the anguish of separation and the intensity of deprivation, raise not thy lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه مطمئنه اگر چه بحرقت هجران و شدت حرمان مبتلا شدی ولی ناله مکن و
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
